title: isotrema salvadorense
intro: Isotrema salvadorense, also known as the Salvadoran isotrema or Mexican isotrema, is a plant species within the family Apocynaceae, native to Central America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isotrema salvadorense include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
